# Blessed SHA256 of the canonical principal-seed simulation output.
#
# Format: '<sha256>  <filename>' (compatible with `shasum -a 256 -c`).
# The CI workflow .github/workflows/reproduce.yml verifies that a clean
# build reproduces this exact byte-for-byte output. Any divergence
# fails the build.
#
# Generated by `python -m idc_simulation run` with the plan defaults:
#   K = 10000, seed = 20260502, plan_version = 1.1,
#   priors = {optimistic, moderate, pessimistic} from priors/.
# Local reproducer (Python 3.13, requirements.txt pin set):
#   2026-05-02 - confirmed bit-identical across two consecutive runs.

7fcc0c891acd9b431e8618e4320a909b0de49d3ae18a0b7cffa560d8401ec6b4  contamination_seed20260502_K10000.parquet
